2605.11260.title: Curriculum Learning-Guided Progressive Distillation in Large Language Models
2605.11260.paper_summary: Knowledge distillation is a key technique for transferring the capabilities of large language models (LLMs) into smaller, more efficient student models. Existing distillation approaches often overlook two critical factors: the learning order of training data and the capacity mismatch between teacher and student models. This oversight limits distillation performance, as manifested by the counter-intuitive phenomenon where stronger teachers fail to produce better students. In this work, we propose Curriculum Learning-Guided Progressive Distillation (CLPD), a unified framework that explicitly accounts for both factors by aligning data difficulty with teacher strength. CLPD constructs an explicit curriculum by organizing training examples from easy to hard, while simultaneously applying an implicit curriculum over supervision signals by progressively scheduling teachers of increasing capacity. Our framework is modular and can be integrated into standard distillation algorithms with minimal overhead. Empirical results on the reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that CLPD consistently outperforms standard distillation, data ordering alone, and teacher scheduling alone across multiple settings. These findings highlight the importance of jointly considering data ordering and teacher capacity when distilling reasoning abilities into small language models.
2605.11260.paper_summary_zh: 知識蒸餾是一種關鍵技術，用於將大型語言模型（LLMs）的能力轉移到更小、更高效的學生模型中。現有的蒸餾方法往往忽略了兩個關鍵因素：訓練數據的學習順序和教師模型與學生模型之間的容量不匹配。這種忽視限制了蒸餾性能，表現為一種反直覺的現象，即更強的教師未必能產生更好的學生。在本研究中，我們提出了課程學習引導的漸進式蒸餾（CLPD），這是一個統一框架，明確考慮了這兩個因素，通過將數據難度與教師強度對齊來實現。CLPD通過將訓練示例從簡單到困難進行組織，構建了一個明確的課程，同時通過逐步安排具有增強容量的教師，對監督信號應用隱式課程。我們的框架是模塊化的，可以以最小的開銷集成到標準蒸餾算法中。在推理基準上的實證結果表明，CLPD在多種設置下始終優於標準蒸餾、僅數據排序和僅教師調度。這些發現強調了在將推理能力蒸餾到小型語言模型時，聯合考慮數據排序和教師容量的重要性。
2605.11260.author: Jincheng Cao et.al.
2605.11260.authors: Jincheng Cao, Fanzhi Zeng, Leqi Liu, Aryan Mokhtari
